title: Best Cotton Kurtis Under ₹500 in 2025
excerpt: Looking for affordable cotton kurtis? Here are our top picks under ₹500 that are perfect for daily wear.
content:
Cotton kurtis are the ultimate go-to outfit for Indian women. They are comfortable, breathable, and perfect for our climate. In this article, we bring you the best cotton kurtis available under ₹500 that you can order right now.

1. Floral Printed Cotton Kurti
This beautiful floral printed kurti is made from 100% cotton. Perfect for office wear and daily use. Available in multiple colors and sizes.

2. Straight Cut Solid Kurti
A classic straight cut kurti in solid colors. Goes well with palazzo pants, jeans, or leggings. Very easy to style.

3. Block Print Kurti
Traditional block print design on soft cotton. Earthy tones that give a very ethnic look. Perfect for festive occasions too.

All these kurtis are available in our shop with fast delivery across India. Check them out below!

title: Top 10 Dresses for Wedding Season 2025
excerpt: Wedding season is here! Check out these stunning dresses that will make you the best-dressed guest.
content:
Wedding season calls for special outfits. Whether you are attending a close friend's wedding or a distant relative's function, you want to look your best without spending too much. Here are our top picks for wedding season 2025.

1. Embroidered Anarkali Suit
Nothing says festive like a gorgeous anarkali. This embroidered piece with dupatta is perfect for mehendi and sangeet functions.

2. Silk Saree with Blouse
A classic silk saree never goes out of fashion. Drape it in a classic style and you are wedding-ready instantly.

3. Designer Palazzo Set
For those who prefer something more modern, a designer palazzo set is a great choice. Comfortable to wear through long functions and looks amazing.

Browse all our wedding outfits in the shop section!

title: How to Style a Kurti 5 Different Ways
excerpt: One kurti, five different looks! Learn how to style your favourite kurti in multiple ways.
content:
A good kurti is one of the most versatile pieces in an Indian woman's wardrobe. The same kurti can look completely different depending on how you style it. Here are 5 ways to wear your favourite kurti.

1. With Jeans
The most popular combo — pair your printed kurti with slim jeans and flats for a casual day out look.

2. With Palazzo Pants
Palazzo pants with a kurti give a very elegant, ethnic look. Perfect for office or semi-formal occasions.

3. As a Short Dress
If your kurti is short (above knee), wear it as a dress with a belt and statement earrings.

4. With Dhoti Pants
Dhoti pants with a kurti give a very trendy, indo-western look. Great for parties and festivals.

5. With Leggings
The classic combo. A long kurti with churidar leggings is always a safe, elegant choice.

Check out our kurti collection to find your next favourite piece!

title: Best Ethnic Wear Under ₹1000 for Diwali
excerpt: Diwali is around the corner! Here are the best ethnic outfits under ₹1000 to celebrate in style.
content:
Diwali is the festival of lights and it calls for your most glamorous outfit. But who says glamorous has to be expensive? Here are our picks for the best ethnic wear under ₹1000 for Diwali 2025.

1. Golden Embroidered Kurti
Gold is the colour of Diwali! A golden embroidered kurti with churidar looks absolutely stunning for the occasion.

2. Banarasi Silk Saree
A Banarasi saree is quintessentially Diwali. Rich colours like deep red, purple, and green look amazing in the diya lighting.

3. Lehenga Choli Set
For a more festive look, a lehenga choli set is the perfect choice. Available in many colours and designs.

All outfits available in our shop with quick delivery. Order now before Diwali!

title: Cotton vs Rayon vs Silk — Which Fabric is Best for Kurtis?
excerpt: Not sure which fabric to choose for your kurti? We break down the pros and cons of each fabric type.
content:
When buying a kurti, the fabric makes all the difference. Different fabrics suit different occasions, seasons, and body types. Here is our complete guide to help you choose the right fabric.

Cotton
Best for: Daily wear, summer season
Pros: Breathable, comfortable, easy to wash, affordable
Cons: Wrinkles easily, may shrink after washing
Our rating: 5/5 for daily wear

Rayon
Best for: Office wear, casual occasions
Pros: Smooth texture, drapes well, does not wrinkle much, affordable
Cons: Not very breathable, may need dry cleaning
Our rating: 4/5 for office and casual wear

Silk
Best for: Festivals, weddings, special occasions
Pros: Luxurious look and feel, beautiful drape
Cons: Expensive, needs careful washing
Our rating: 5/5 for festive occasions

Browse our collection of kurtis in all these fabrics in the shop!
